title: MelloMons
description: A datapack adding a remodel for Mew to Cobblemon.
body:
## MelloMons
Currently this pack only adds in a remodel with a few animations for Mew. I do intend to add some cosmetic variants for mew later, but when that will be is undetermined.

This pack may end up solely as a Mew remodel datapack or perhaps I will add in some other Pokemon I have created or end up wanting to remodel.

![Mew!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc6296a476675fb2af12252a37394083d313d59.png)

## Installation
After downloading the Datapack, be sure to put it in your "resources" folder and "datapack" folder within your world.

## Spawn Info

### Mew
>   Mew has a **very rare** chance to spawn in **Jungle** biomes at any time.

![Eepy Mew!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5016101ea4ee94fea4718972244a26d28ea14e2a.png)

## Contributors
A special and huge thanks to the following people for contributing towards this datapack! :D
> BeeZy - Compiling the datapack

> DaDolphin - Providing adorable animations for Mew!
